title: 1.1: Uses UniStore as the primary storage for all 6 IAM resources (team, teamBinding, user, serviceAccount, externalGroupMapping, resourcePermission) in UpdateAPIGroupInfo in pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go

1.2: Applies dual write conditionally for all 6 IAM resources (team, teamBinding, user, serviceAccount, externalGroupMapping, resourcePermission) only when a legacy store is available in pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go
1.3: Removes noopStorage instantiation from NewAPIService in pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go

1.4: Adds all 5 legacy store tracking fields (userLegacyStore, saLegacyStore, legacyTeamStore, teamBindingLegacyStore, ssoLegacyStore) to IdentityAccessManagementAPIBuilder in pkg/registry/apis/iam/models.go
1.5: Removes the enableDualWriter boolean field from IdentityAccessManagementAPIBuilder in models.go
1.6: Removes all 5 if-b.enableDualWriter conditional blocks in UpdateAPIGroupInfo (team, teamBinding, user, serviceAccount, externalGroupMapping) from register.go
3.1: Removes the noopstorage import from pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go
4.1: Omits storage registration for any of the 6 IAM resources (team, teamBinding, user, serviceAccount, externalGroupMapping, resourcePermission)
